auth.welcomeBack: Welcome back! Please login to your account
auth.secureDesc: Customer payment information via NFC is fully encrypted. Your store's Stripe account is completely independent - simply add your API key to receive payments directly without any intervention from us or ability to access them.
auth.fastDesc: Smart interface allowing cashiers to select table number and enter price to instantly activate the specific NFC sticker, enabling customers to scan with their phone and pay seamlessly.
auth.globalDesc: The system currently operates in a secure test environment allowing you to simulate table linking and NFC Sticker payment processes to ensure smooth operation before actual launch.
auth.loginSubtitle: Enter your credentials to access your account
auth.agreeTerms: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
auth.securityValue: Your smart payments with one tap, using the highest global security and encryption standards
auth.companyVision: We're leading the future of digital payments and NFC solutions, empowering businesses worldwide with seamless, secure, and innovative payment experiences.
auth.nfcActivationSubtitle: Enter the activation code and table details to link this sticker
auth.activationCodePlaceholder: Enter the activation code from your sticker box
auth.activationError: Invalid activation code or sticker already activated

securityContent.title: Our Security Commitment
securityContent.encryption: 🔐 End-to-End Encryption: All transactions are encrypted using industry-standard AES-256 encryption.
securityContent.stripe: 💳 Stripe Test Environment: We use Stripe's secure test environment for all payment processing.
securityContent.nfc: 📱 NFC Tap Security: NFC transactions are secured with tokenization and never store raw card data.
securityContent.data: 🛡️ Data Protection: We never store sensitive card information. Only secure tokens are used.
securityContent.compliance: ✅ Compliance: Our system adheres to PCI DSS standards for payment security.
